title: No 3rd Person Items
description: Makes it so that items in third person perspective are not rendered and are invisible for more fps because frames per second boosts are good 🗿
body:
This texture pack makes it so you can't see any items that other players are holding. If you don't care about seeing other people's items, then you can install this texture pack to get an fps boost when you're around a lot of people.

# Without the Pack
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e59af8e5f638a5d0fd0fbf797a1b76376364b83.png)

# With the Pack
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e82193dd6f118a3f73a025744d94551e848081c0.png)
